text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Ethnic Advocacy Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community Hispanic/Latino Community Muslim Community Somali Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LATINO NETWORK ADVOCACY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Trains youth and adults in civic engagement and advocacy, mobilizes community members for key meetings and testimony opportunities, and advocates at the city, county, and state level. 410 NE 18th Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 283-6881 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LATINO NETWORK ADVOCACY
